title: libreswan bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[5.3-1.0.1]
- Add libreswan-oracle.patch to detect Oracle Linux distro

[5.3-1]
- Update to libreswan-5.3

[5.2-2]
- ipsec delete: expect no IKE only for orphan child
full_text:
[5.3-1.0.1]
- Add libreswan-oracle.patch to detect Oracle Linux distro

[5.3-1]
- Update to libreswan-5.3

[5.2-2]
- ipsec delete: expect no IKE only for orphan child

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20422-0.html
